title: Adding support for Xilinx memory attribute 'block' in single port mode.
body:
The following PR is to open a discussion about supporting `ram_style` attributes in `memory_bram` match rules. This approach needs Dave's `memory_collect.cc` changes from PR #1501 .

Having the following module with `ram_style="block"` attribute defined:
```verilog
`default_nettype none
module memory #(parameter W=8, D=64)
   (input wire clk, wr_en,
    input wire [W-1:0]  wr_addr, rd_addr,
    input wire [W-1:0]  din,
    output reg [W-1:0]  dout);

   (*ram_style = "block"*)
   reg [W-1:0]          mem [D-1:0];

   always @(posedge clk) begin
      if(wr_en) mem[wr_addr] <= din;
      dout <= mem[rd_addr];
   end
endmodule // memory
```
Yosys is able to match to a RAMB18E1, even if the `min bits` and `min efficiency` are below the constraints:
```
=== memory ===

   Number of wires:                  9
   Number of wire bits:             72
   Number of public wires:           6
   Number of public wire bits:      34
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                  2
     BUFG                            1
     RAMB18E1                        1

   Estimated number of LCs:          0
```

As @eddiehung and I discussed, the apporach is to have a new match rule `attribute` into `xc7_xcu_brams.txt` as follows:
```
match $__XILINX_RAMB18_SDP
  min bits 4096
  min efficiency 5
  shuffle_enable B
  make_transp
  attribute ram_style block
  or_next_if_better
endmatch
``` 
So, if the attribute in the RTL object match to the one defined in the match rule, we bypass the `min bits` and `min efficiency` checks. This is done just for `RAMB18E1`.
code_blocks:
=== memory ===

   Number of wires:                  9
   Number of wire bits:             72
   Number of public wires:           6
   Number of public wire bits:      34
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                  2
     BUFG                            1
     RAMB18E1                        1

   Estimated number of LCs:          0

match $__XILINX_RAMB18_SDP
  min bits 4096
  min efficiency 5
  shuffle_enable B
  make_transp
  attribute ram_style block
  or_next_if_better
endmatch
